name: TCP Banner Check
description: Connects to a TCP port and optionally evaluates whether a banner is returned.

config_schema.label: Expected Banner
config_schema.help_text: If set, the plugin will try to match this text inside the returned banner.

config_schema.label: Match Mode
config_schema.help_text: Choose whether the returned banner must contain or exactly match the expected text.

config_schema.label: Read Banner
config_schema.help_text: Disable this if the service does not return a banner immediately.

config_schema.label: Shared Secret
config_schema.help_text: Reserved for future plugin-side verification logic.
